primary.title: Will Republican win the Presidency in 2028?
primary.rationale: Best-in-class long-dated binary market on Kalshi with deepest book depth (thousands of shares on multiple levels both sides). yes_ask=39c, resting at 31c is 8c below ask and 7c below best bid (38c) - guaranteed to rest in queue behind existing 3800 qty at that level. Closes Nov 2029.

runner_up.title: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 3.50% following the Fed's April 2027 meeting?
runner_up.rationale: Long-lived Fed binary (12+ months out). Less depth than presidential but still 2-sided with thousands of qty. Good fallback if KXPRESPARTY unavailable in demo.
